examples.title: Algorithm: Wiener Filter
examples.description: Pseudocode for the Wiener filter algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM WienerFilter
INPUT: noisy_image, blurring_kernel, regularization_parameter
OUTPUT: restored_image

BEGIN
 Compute the Fourier transform of the blurring kernel
 Compute the Wiener filter using the formula: W = H^* (H H^*)^-1
 Apply the Wiener filter to the noisy image
 Return the restored image
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the Wiener filter algorithm, which is used to restore images in the presence of noise.

examples.title: Python: Wiener Filter
examples.description: Python implementation of the Wiener filter algorithm
examples.code:
import numpy as np
from scipy import ndimage

# Define the Wiener filter function
def wiener_filter(noisy_image, blurring_kernel, regularization_parameter):
 # Compute the Fourier transform of the blurring kernel
 H = np.fft.fft2(blurring_kernel)
 # Compute the Wiener filter using the formula: W = H^* (H H^*)^-1
 W = np.conj(H) / (np.abs(H)**2 + regularization_parameter)
 # Apply the Wiener filter to the noisy image
 restored_image = np.real(np.fft.ifft2(W * np.fft.fft2(noisy_image)))
 return restored_image
examples.explanation: This Python code implements the Wiener filter algorithm using the NumPy and SciPy libraries.
